display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Doors of Light and Dark
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Doors of Light And Dark.png}} {{E|Doors of Light and Dark|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Light Door}} {{TS|positive||[[Upgrade]] 2 random cards.}}
{{Frame|Dark Door}} {{TS|positive||Remove 1 card from Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
A doorway existed where none existed moments before... You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman. "Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!" Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?
{{Frame|Light Door}}
Into the light... It's blinding!! But the light strengthens you. You're back in the Underdocks. How did you? Huh...?
{{Frame|Dark Door}}
Into the darkness... You see nothing. But this helps you think... You shed pointless thoughts. You're back in the Underdocks. How did you? Huh...?
